results.title: Luke Wilson teases 'The Family Stone' sequel, says, "I can't believe it's happening"
results.description: Luke Wilson has confirmed that The Family Stone sequel is moving forward, calling the script "really funny" and expressing excitement about reuniting with the original cast.

results.title: Jennifer Winget's husband William Ishmael; know about his career, education and life away from the spotlight
results.description: TV actor Jennifer Winget has spent over two decades in the entertainment industry, building one of the most successful careers in Indian television. She won millions of hearts with shows such as Dill Mill Gayye, Saraswatichandra, Beyhadh and Bepannaah. The actress has now tied the knot with her partner, William Ishmael.
